assertions.title: All pages readable in dark mode

steps.observed: Logged in successfully, redirected to admin dashboard
Dashboard loads with dark background, white text clearly visible

steps.expected: Users page readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Users table loads with dark theme, text legible

steps.expected: Roles page readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Roles table loads with dark theme, all text readable

steps.expected: Approvals page readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Approvals page loads with dark background, cards and text visible

steps.expected: Audit Trail readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Audit table displays with dark theme

steps.expected: Finance page readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Finance page displays with dark theme

steps.expected: Support page readable in dark mode
steps.observed: Support tickets visible with dark background
Changelog entries visible in dark mode
Notifications form visible in dark mode
Settings sections visible in dark mode

evidence.network: All pages loaded successfully with 200 status codes

assertions.title: No light backgrounds in dark mode (all surfaces use var(--color-surface-*))

steps.expected: All surfaces use dark CSS variables
steps.observed: Dashboard uses dark background (#0f0f0f or similar), no white/light backgrounds visible

steps.expected: Table and cards use dark surfaces
steps.observed: DataTable uses dark background with proper CSS variables
All pages consistently use var(--color-surface-*) tokens

steps.action: Check Dashboard stat cards for sparklines
steps.observed: Green line sparklines clearly visible on dark stat cards
Green sparklines (Revenue Run Rate, Fulfillment SLA) and red/orange sparkline (Dealer Coverage) are clearly distinguishable

assertions.title: Form inputs adapt to dark mode

steps.observed: Text inputs, select dropdown, and textarea display with dark backgrounds and light text
Input fields show dark styling with proper text contrast
Recipient dropdown, subject input, and body textarea all use dark styling

summary: Tested 4 assertions: All passed. Dark mode works correctly across all admin pages (Dashboard, Users, Roles, Approvals, Audit Trail, Finance, Support, Changelog, Notifications, Settings). All text is legible, sparklines are visible, form inputs adapt properly, and no light backgrounds appear in dark mode.
